albase:trial-rotation-reset-chat: §5[Hollow Trials]§r The rifts have shifted. New hollows have awakened.
albase:trial-warden-greeting: You feel it? The cold from the rifts... They've opened again. I know where they are. I always know.
albase:trial-warden-greeting-rank1: You're back. The rifts don't wait — the hollows grow stronger each day.
albase:trial-warden-greeting-rank2: Hardened... You've seen enough to understand. The deep rifts await you.
albase:trial-warden-greeting-rank3: Void Master. Few make it this far. The abyssal rifts... they're different. Be ready.
albase:trial-warden-intro-text:
In certain places, the fabric of reality has worn thin. Through the rifts, creatures seep in — hollows. They don't hunt. They simply exist. But approach them, and they perceive it as intrusion.

I cannot close the rifts. No one can. But I know where they appear. Take this shard — it resonates with the void. It will help you find the way.
albase:trial-warden-quest-offer: A rift is active. The hollow awaits.
albase:trial-warden-quest-complete: The rift has quieted... for now. Take this — you've earned it.
albase:trial-warden-quest-cooldown: That rift is still recovering. Come back later.
albase:trial-warden-shop-locked: You lack the experience. Keep clearing rifts.
albase:trial-tracker-desc: A shard resonating with Abyss spawn. When used, creates a particle trail toward the nearest rift. Each use takes a sliver of life.
albase:trial-tracker-no-target: §7[Echo of the Void]§r No target found. No active contract.
albase:trial-tracker-no-hp: §c[Echo of the Void]§r Not enough health.
albase:trial-tracker-cooldown: §7[Echo of the Void]§r The shard is recovering...
albase:trial-tracker-activated: §5[Echo of the Void]§r The void responds... Follow the particles.
albase:trial-shadow-stalker-desc: Clear the rift: destroy the Shadow Stalker.
albase:trial-shadow-stalker-accepted: §5[Hollow Trials]§r Contract accepted: Shadow Stalker. Use Echo of the Void to track it.
albase:trial-quest-tier1-desc: Destroy the hollow in the rift.
albase:trial-quest-tier2-desc: Destroy the hollow in the deep rift.
albase:trial-quest-tier3-desc: Destroy the hollow in the abyssal rift.
albase:trial-quest-accepted-tier1: §5[Hollow Trials]§r Contract accepted: Hollow Trial. Use Echo of the Void to track it.
albase:trial-quest-accepted-tier2: §5[Hollow Trials]§r Contract accepted: Deep Trial. Use Echo of the Void to track it.
albase:trial-quest-accepted-tier3: §5[Hollow Trials]§r Contract accepted: Abyssal Trial. Use Echo of the Void to track it.
